summary: Completed testing of Infinit-Audit new features: Bigger logo, Emergent badge removal, offline support, and core audit functionality. All requested features verified working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 when audit template referenced by run audit has been deleted (orphaned data)
minor.note: Data integrity issue from previous testing - not a code bug

passed_tests: Login with admin@infinit-audit.co.uk / admin123 - SUCCESS
Emergent badge removed from index.html - VERIFIED
Login page logo size h-24 (96px height) - VERIFIED
Sidebar logo size h-14 (56px height) - VERIFIED
Offline indicator appears in sidebar when offline - VERIFIED
Offline toast notification shows when going offline - VERIFIED
Offline indicator hides when back online - VERIFIED
Dashboard loads with statistics (1 audit, 5 runs, 60% pass rate, 3 users) - SUCCESS
Create Audit page loads with form elements - SUCCESS
Run Audit page shows audit cards with Start Audit buttons - SUCCESS
Run Audit flow: start audit, answer questions, navigate between questions - SUCCESS
Reports page shows completed audits table with 6 entries - SUCCESS
Reports page has PDF download buttons (6 found) - SUCCESS
PDF export API works for valid run audits - SUCCESS (2493 bytes PDF generated)
Backend API: Health endpoint - 200 OK
Backend API: Auth login - 200 OK

Backend API: Create audit - 200 OK

success_rate.backend: 89% (16/18 tests passed - 2 failed due to orphaned test data)

seed_data_creation: Created test audit via API: TEST_API_Audit_Template
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: 1) Logo sizes increased (h-24 login, h-14 sidebar), 2) Emergent badge removed from index.html, 3) Offline indicator working in sidebar with toast notifications, 4) PDF export working for valid audits. Some orphaned run audits exist from previous testing that reference deleted audit templates - these cause 404 on PDF/details endpoints but this is a data issue not a code bug.
